## Photronics Shareholders Named in Potential Class-Action Notice

Class-action notices can signal material undisclosed issues or prior disclosure failures; insufficient detail from the headline to assess materiality, but the overhang warrants tracking if PLAB is relevant to any supply-chain position.

- A GlobeNewswire notice targets Photronics (PLAB) shareholders who sustained losses.
- The headline strongly suggests a class-action legal notice but provides no detail on allegations, timing, or magnitude.
